property.name: xasecure.audit.is.enabled
property.description: Enable or disable audit logging globally.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.solr
property.description: Enable audit logging to Apache Solr.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.solr.urls
property.description: Solr URL for audit log collection.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.solr.batch.filespool.dir
property.description: Local spool directory for Solr audit batches. Used when Solr is temporarily unreachable.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.hdfs.batch.filespool.dir
property.description: Local spool directory for HDFS audit batches.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.log4j
property.description: Enable audit logging to Log4j. Useful for local development and debugging. Logs to the ranger.audit logger.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.log4j.logger
property.description: Log4j logger name for audit events.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.amazon_s3
property.description: Enable audit logging to Amazon S3.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.amazon_s3.bucket
property.description: S3 bucket name for audit logs.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.amazon_s3.prefix
property.description: S3 key prefix for audit log objects.

property.name: xasecure.audit.destination.amazon_s3.region
property.description: AWS region for the S3 audit bucket.

property.name: xasecure.audit.queue.max.capacity
property.description: Maximum number of audit events to queue in memory before flushing to the destination.

property.name: xasecure.audit.queue.max.flush.interval.ms
property.description: Maximum interval in milliseconds between audit flushes.
